calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Aug-24-2017 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-24-2017 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem: Neil Bardack, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. (D501/JPT)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Haim Albalak is present.
Attorney Daniel Cheung for the plaintiff.
Defendant Fernando J. Senegal is present.
Attorney Robert Kane appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of August 28, 2017 is vacated. (501)
